DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC'S MOTION FOR ORDER ESTABLISHING ADMISSIONS IS CONTINUED TO MAY 30, 2014 TO GIVE THE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN MAY 23, 2014 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). ANY PARTY WHO CONTESTS A TENTATIVE RULING MUST SEND AN EMAIL TO CONTESTDEPT302TR@SFTC.ORG WITH A COPY TO ALL OTHER PARTIES BY 4PM STATING, WITHOUT ARGUMENT, THE PORTION(S) OF THE TENTATIVE RULING THAT THE PARTY CONTESTS. THE SUBJECT LINE OF THE EMAIL SHALL INCLUDE THE LINE NUMBER, CASE NAME AND CASE NUMBER. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANTHONY SCHOENBERG, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED.=(302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-02-2014 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-02-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Entry of Judgment.
Department 514, Judge: Harry Dorfman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR #6840

Jill Bates-Moore, Esq.,(510-985-9250) appearing specially for Plaintiff Midland Funding, LLC.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant Laza Vo.
Amended Declaration of Peter Huber pursuant to CCP 98, submitted in lieu of testimony.
After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff Midland Funding LLC., and against Defendant Laza Vo as follows:

Principal $5,911.93
Pre-Judgment Interest $1,178.52
Attorney's Fees & Costs $383.00
Plaintiff waives attorney's fees and costs not on this judgment.
Total Judgment in the amount of $7,473.45
Judgment signed in open court.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Establishing Admissions
Off Calendar May-30-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on the matter, tentative ruling is adopted.
PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC'S Motion For Order Establishing Admissions is granted. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. Judge Pro-tem: Tom Cohen; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not Reported. =302/jpt

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Establishing Admissions
Off Calendar May-23-2014 Continued To May-30-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC's Motion For Order Establishing Admissions is Continued to May 30, 2014 to give the moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than May 23, 2014 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Any party who contests a tentative ruling must send an email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties by 4pm stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. The subject line of the email shall include the line number, case name and case number. Judge Pro Tem: Anthony Schoenberg, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported.=(302/JPT)
